recommendations.title: Four to Dinner
recommendations.overview: In this rom-com challenging the concept of soulmates, parallel storylines portray four single friends as they pair up in different couple combinations.

recommendations.title: Unique Brothers
recommendations.overview: A funny story about two brothers, Pietro and Francesco, and what happens with them and their families after Petro loses his memory.

recommendations.title: Couple Therapy for Cheaters
recommendations.overview: Reckless and in love, Viviana and Modesto are bound by an uncontrollable passion. Their secret relationship ends up in front of an incredulous therapist, who'll anyway help them understanding their feelings and dealing with their desire to follow the

recommendations.title: Everyone Wants It
recommendations.overview: Giovanna, Carla, Francesca, Chiara. What these women have in common so different from each other? Which will never be the not insignificant detail that makes their lives secretly imperfect? And what mystery female is so intimate and private, that mor

recommendations.title: Don't Blame Karma!
recommendations.overview: The travails of Sara, a frustrated fashion designer who blames karma for her bad luck. Fate will put her face to face with her sister, Lucy, who enjoys very different luck, and in a series of events and reunions that will lead her to make a radical d

recommendations.title: Housefull
recommendations.overview: Believing himself to be a jinx and bringing bad luck upon himself and others, a man attempts to find true love, but ends up in very complicated relationships.

recommendations.title: Girl in the Basement
recommendations.overview: Sara is a teen girl who is looking forward to her 18th birthday to move away from her controlling father Don. But before she could even blow out the candles, Don imprisons her in the basement of their home.

recommendations.title: EO
recommendations.overview: The world is a mysterious place when seen through the eyes of an animal. EO, a grey donkey with melancholic eyes, meets good and bad people on his life’s path, experiences joy and pain, endures the wheel of fortune randomly turn his luck into disaste

recommendations.title: Love Tactics
recommendations.overview: An ad executive and a fashion designer-blogger don't believe in love, so they place a bet to make the other fall head over heels - with unusual tactics.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.
